title: alpinia pahangensis
intro: Alpinia pahangensis is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family Zingiberaceae. It is native to the Pahang region of Malaysia and is also known as Pahang ginger. Alpinia pahangensis has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
